pr.title: feat(ui): Discover Figma redesign + Preview OAuth PKCE fix

receipt.goal: Discover Figma UI + OAuth callback stays on current tab origin (fixes Preview PKCE).

auth_fix.root_cause: NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL used for non-localhost browser → Preview sent redirectTo to emberplay.app while PKCE was on *.vercel.app.
auth_fix.fix: getAuthCallbackOrigin(): browser → window.location.origin; server preview → VERCEL_URL; production → SITE_URL.
supabase_redirect_urls: https://*.vercel.app/auth/callback (if supported) or add preview hosts
